channel.title: Projects on Kartik Rathor
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Kartik Rathor

item.title: Self-hosted archive
item.description:
A read-only archive for notes, scripts, and low-bandwidth reference material.

It is intentionally small, predictable, and easy to update with a single deploy step.

item.title: Terminal blog
item.description:
A static blog design inspired by terminal aesthetics and plain text workflows.

No JavaScript. No cards. No popup menus.

The experience is meant to feel like a beautifully formatted README.
